typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varFileExists as boolean (),
	VarFromAddress as string (),
	VarNonNumericCount as integer (),
	varSSISOps_944B293B6054478C9B54DAE026AE6F98_RowCount_1 as integer (),
	varSSISOps_944B293B6054478C9B54DAE026AE6F98_RowCount_2 as integer (),
	varSSISOps_DisableBIxAuditing as boolean (),
	varSSISOps_GroupNames as string (),
	VarSubject as string (),
	VarToAddress as string (),
	pkgParamBatchID as integer (),
	pkgParamDestinationConnectionString as string (),
	pkgParamInterfaceID as integer (),
	pkgParamPackageID as integer (),
	pkgParamSMTP as string (),
	pkgParamSourceConnectionString as string (),
	pkgParamSourceStoredProcedure as string ()
}

source(output(
		{Site key} as string,
		{Product Key} as string,
		Period as string,
		Forecast as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> FlatFileSource
FlatFileSource derive(ValidDataCheck = iif(toInteger(Forecast) == toInteger(Forecast), 1, 0)) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn split(isNull(ValidDataCheck), disjoint: true) ~> ConditionalSplit@(InvalidRows,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
